items.title: Summer Game Fest Live 2026: The biggest news, trailers, and announcements
items.description: Geoff Keighley’s annual June showcase for videos games has officially happened, and it was a big one. items.title: Final Fantasy VII’s remake trilogy will conclude with Revelation
items.description: Square Enix has officially announced the third and final game in its Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy: Final Fantasy VII Revelation. It will release on multiple platforms simultaneously - PC, PS5, Xbox Series X / S, and Nintendo Switch 2 - in spring 2027. In footage shown onstage at Summer Game Fest...

items.title: More than a decade later, the team behind N++ is back with a multiplayer sequel
items.description: Back in 2015, the two-person studio Metanet released N++, a brutally hard 2D platformer that was a decade in the making, building off of previous releases dating back to the freeware Flash title N. At the time, cofounder Raigan Burns issued some famous last words: "We hope it's not another 10 years ...

items.title: Grand Theft Auto VI is warping the video game release calendar
items.description: Who's afraid of the next GTA? Based on the last few days of Summer Game Fest, just about everyone. Grand Theft Auto VI hasn't been present at any of the keynote events, but its presence was felt every time a release date was announced. The month of November, when GTA VI launches, is virtually empty....

items.title: Control Resonant is a sequel — and also a starting point
items.description: Chronologically, Control Resonant is a sequel to 2019's Control. But in most other ways, the games aren't directly connected. To developer Remedy, they're more like two sides of the same coin. When Resonant was first revealed last year, creative director Mikael Kasurinen said you can play the games ...

items.title: Congress still can’t decide what to do about warrantless surveillance
items.description: The deadline to reauthorize Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act is coming up a week from now on June 12th, and legislators seem no closer to reaching a deal. items.title: What happens when your phone is confiscated at the airport
items.description: Even if you've done nothing wrong, it's never a good idea to hand your phone to the cops. But international travelers at American airports often have no choice - even if they're US citizens. When Minnesota labor organizer Janette Zahia Corcelius returned home from a three-week trip to Europe in late...
